title: Demon Dragon scales from opponent hand

card.rawText: For every card in your opponents' hand add: Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Modifier: +1.

effect.value: For every card in opponents' hand: Atk Dice Rolls +1; Modifier +1

plan.title: Demon Dragon scales from opponent hand
plan.summary: Put Demon Dragon on field and verify its attack dice and modifier scale from the opponent's current hand size.

notes: Set Demon Dragon as player_1 primary creature.
Use the default headless player_2 hand size as the opponent hand-count source.

steps: Set Demon Dragon as player_1 primary creature.
Read Demon Dragon's effective attack dice and modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent hand cards add attack dice

manualVerification: Confirm the bonus updates if the opponent hand size changes during play.
riskNotes: This fixture uses the default headless opponent hand size of 6 cards, so Demon Dragon's base 1 attack die/modifier become 7.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Demon Dragon opponent hand-count scaling.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
